caption: A video call interface is shared on a screen, featuring a person wearing a dark cap and shirt in a small video window in the upper right. The main area displays a dark digital whiteboard containing a network map with various circular icons and connecting lines. A prominent teal rectangular card with the word "SHARE" in white uppercase letters is central to the map, with a smaller icon of a person nearby. The browser tabs at the top list various titles, including "Trial & Learning by Systemshift," "Future of Society by Systemshift," and "Insights | Introduction | Kumu." Between frames, the screen transitions as a user interacts with the interface, causing a brief flicker or shift in the layout of the call participants' windows. The overall scene remains consistent, showing a presentation of a conceptual map during a virtual meeting.
